headline: Welcome to Free AI-Prowler™ Home Version 6.0.0
body:
Your Personal Agentic AI Knowledge Base for Claude.

AI-Prowler™ Home Version for Windows 11, index and scan your local documents and makes them searchable through Claude — on desktop, web acess, and mobile acess.

★ Index local and Onedrive documents from any folder on your PC with many file formats supported.
★ Data Base supports rich meta data and meaning space encoding allowing Agentic AI to query intelligently.
★ ChromaDB Data base allows easiley 10,000+ files to be indexed and Index 65+ file formats types supported including Images and Scanned PDF with Optical Character Recognition for text extraction.
★ Connect AI-Prowler™ via Claude Desktop (local) or Claude.ai (remote).
★ Smart Scan skips binaries and system files automatically, Automatic Scheduled scan updates.
★ AI-Prowler™ Home is free to use on the desktop with free Claude desktop with MCP.
★ AI-Prowler™ Home also has remote access capability with web based claude.ai or Claude Cell App with Claude Pro account ~$20/Month. Free trial one button HTTPS access with Cloudflare Quick Tunnel or more permanent Cloudflare registered Domain accounts avaliable for $11/year.
★ AI-Prowler™ Business is avaliable for Multi-Users (Link is TBD).


Get started: click the Index Docs tab to add your first folder.
footer: AI-Prowler™ Home — Free for personal use  |  Business & Mobile Business editions available
